description_long: This is a pink, squeezable tube of lotion with a white cap at the bottom, designed for personal care use. The front of the tube features the brand name 'Lady Lamduan' in large, elegant script, along with the product name and additional details in smaller text. The tube is adorned with flowing, wave-like graphic patterns in white, giving it a modern and feminine appearance. The back of the tube contains more detailed product information, including ingredients and usage instructions, all printed in white text. The cap appears to be a flip-top style, providing easy access to the lotion inside. The overall form is cylindrical with a slightly tapered body, typical of cosmetic tubes.
description: A pink, squeezable lotion tube with a white flip-top cap, featuring elegant wave graphics and detailed product branding.
description_view_0: The back of the pink lotion tube, showing detailed product information and ingredients in white text.
description_view_1: A narrow side view of the tube, revealing the cylindrical shape and the seam where the cap meets the body.
description_view_2: The front of the tube, displaying the 'Lady Lamduan' brand, product name, and decorative wave graphics.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, again showing the tube's slim profile and the continuation of the graphic pattern.
